setup.title: WhatsApp Business API Setup
setup.description: Configure WhatsApp Business settings and link with Meta Business
setup.ownershipCertificateDesc: Phone number ownership verification certificate approved by Meta Business
setup.certificateInfo: This certificate confirms your ownership of the phone number in WhatsApp Business API
setup.step1: 1. Save this certificate in a safe place
setup.step2: 2. Use it to confirm phone ownership in Twilio dashboard
setup.step3: 3. Make sure the display name matches your registered company name
setup.twilioWhatsappDesc: Configure Twilio account information for sending WhatsApp messages
setup.twilioPhoneHint: Must start with "whatsapp:" followed by the phone number
setup.linkPhoneInTwilio: Link phone number in Twilio Console
setup.testSendingMessagesDesc: Make sure the system can send WhatsApp messages successfully
setup.testMessageInfo: A test message will arrive at the specified number within seconds. Make sure the number is registered in WhatsApp.

finalSetup.title: 🎉 WhatsApp Business API Ready!
finalSetup.description: WhatsApp system has been set up successfully with all required features
finalSetup.setupCompleteDesc: System is ready to send WhatsApp messages using Twilio with Content Template linked to Meta approved template. No more error 63016!
finalSetup.finalTestDesc: Send a test message to confirm proper operation
finalSetup.availableFeaturesDesc: All features are ready for use in MPBF system
finalSetup.sendMessagesDesc: Send WhatsApp messages to employees and customers
finalSetup.instantNotificationsDesc: Automatic notifications for orders and maintenance
finalSetup.useInProductionDesc: System is ready to send order and maintenance notifications
finalSetup.monitorPerformanceDesc: Track message status and delivery rates
finalSetup.messageSentDesc: WhatsApp message sent using Content Template

metaSetup.title: 🚀 Meta WhatsApp Business API Setup
metaSetup.description: Setup and configure Meta WhatsApp Business API for direct use
metaSetup.importantNoteDesc: Using Meta WhatsApp API directly provides more control and lower cost than Twilio, but requires more detailed technical setup. Make sure to complete all steps carefully.
metaSetup.setupBusinessManagerDesc: Create and setup Meta Business Manager account
metaSetup.createMetaAppDesc: Create an app in Meta for Developers
metaSetup.createBusinessApp: Create a new app of type "Business"
metaSetup.getAppCredentials: Get App ID and App Secret
metaSetup.fromAppDashboard: From App Dashboard → WhatsApp → API Setup
metaSetup.createSystemUser: Create System User in Business Manager
metaSetup.linkSystemUser: Link System User to WhatsApp Business Account
metaSetup.setupPhoneNumberDesc: Register and setup WhatsApp Business number
metaSetup.registerBusinessPhone: Register business phone number in Meta
metaSetup.requiredVariablesDesc: Add these variables in Replit Secrets
metaSetup.accessTokenDesc: Permanent Access Token from Meta Business Manager
metaSetup.phoneNumberIdDesc: Phone Number ID registered in Meta
metaSetup.testMetaApiDesc: Test sending a message via Meta WhatsApp API
metaSetup.directApiBenefits: 🎯 Benefits of using Meta API directly
metaSetup.lowerCostDesc: No intermediary fees, only Meta fees
metaSetup.fullControlDesc: Direct management of templates and settings
metaSetup.advancedFeaturesDesc: Access to all WhatsApp Business features
metaSetup.messageSentDesc: Test message sent via Meta WhatsApp API

troubleshoot.title: 🔧 WhatsApp Troubleshooting
troubleshoot.description: Step by step guide to solve WhatsApp messaging issues
troubleshoot.errorDescription: WhatsApp Business Account not configured properly or recipient not registered
troubleshoot.solution1: Make sure WhatsApp Business Account is activated in Meta Business Manager
troubleshoot.solution2: Make sure the account is linked to Twilio correctly
troubleshoot.solution3: Make sure recipient number is registered in WhatsApp and accepts business messages
troubleshoot.solution4: In Sandbox mode, recipient numbers must be added manually
troubleshoot.checklistDesc: Follow these steps in order to solve the issue
troubleshoot.checkTwilioConsoleDesc: Make sure WhatsApp Business is set up in Twilio Console
troubleshoot.checkTwilioAction1: Go to Twilio Console → Messaging → WhatsApp senders
troubleshoot.checkTwilioAction2: Make sure +15557911537 is activated and verified
troubleshoot.verifyRecipientDesc: Make sure recipient phone number is registered in WhatsApp
troubleshoot.verifyRecipientAction1: Make sure the number is registered in WhatsApp
troubleshoot.verifyRecipientAction2: Make sure the number accepts messages from business numbers
troubleshoot.verifyRecipientAction3: Try sending a message to a different number
troubleshoot.checkTemplateApprovalDesc: Make sure message templates are approved in Meta Business Manager
troubleshoot.checkTemplateAction1: Go to Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp → Message Templates
troubleshoot.checkTemplateAction2: Make sure there is an approved message template
troubleshoot.checkTemplateAction3: Create a "Hello World" template if it doesn't exist
troubleshoot.sandboxAction1: In WhatsApp Sandbox, recipient numbers must be added manually
troubleshoot.sandboxAction2: Send a "join" message to Sandbox number from your phone
troubleshoot.sandboxAction3: Make sure recipient number is added to Sandbox
troubleshoot.webhookAction1: Go to Twilio Console → Messaging → WhatsApp senders → Configure
troubleshoot.webhookAction2: Make sure Webhook URL is set up correctly
